SELECT value AS original_value, reinterpretAsInt32(original_value) AS reinterpreted_value FROM test_table;
CREATE TABLE complex_table (id UInt32, str_value String);
SELECT ct.id, ct.str_value, reinterpretAsInt32(toInt32(ct.id * 100)) AS reinterpreted FROM complex_table AS ct WHERE ct.id > 1;
WITH (SELECT avg(value) FROM test_table) AS avg_value SELECT reinterpretAsInt32(avg_value) AS reinterpreted_avg;
SELECT ct.id, reinterpretAsInt32(ct.id) AS reinterpreted_id FROM complex_table AS ct JOIN test_table AS tt ON ct.id = reinterpretAsInt32(tt.value) WHERE tt.value > 0;
